title: CSA CCM v4 to Alibaba Cloud Security Services Cross-Reference
description: Maps CSA Cloud Controls Matrix v4 domains to Alibaba Cloud security services and features that implement or support each domain's control objectives. Use to identify which Alibaba Cloud services satisfy CCM requirements for cloud security assessments.
verificationNote: Alibaba Cloud service mappings are based on publicly documented service capabilities. Alibaba Cloud services evolve frequently -- verify current capabilities against Alibaba Cloud documentation. Not endorsed by CSA or Alibaba Cloud.

alibabaServices.description: Records API calls and operations across Alibaba Cloud services. Provides audit trail for compliance assessments. Maps to A&A-01 (audit planning) and A&A-02 (independent assessments).
Continuous configuration compliance monitoring and evaluation against compliance rules. Supports A&A-03 (risk-based planning) through automated compliance checks.
Access to Alibaba Cloud compliance certifications (ISO 27001, SOC 2, CSA STAR, MLPS 2.0). Supports A&A-05 (information system regulatory mapping).
Managed WAF protecting web applications from OWASP Top 10 attacks, bot management, and API abuse. Implements AIS-01 (application security) for web applications.
Cloud workload protection platform with vulnerability scanning, baseline checks, and runtime protection. Supports AIS-02 (application security testing).
Managed API gateway with authentication, throttling, and request validation. Supports AIS-04 (secure application design) for API security.
Container image registry with built-in vulnerability scanning. Supports AIS-02 for container image security.
Centralised backup service for ECS, NAS, OSS, and on-premises workloads. Supports BCR-01 and BCR-04 (backup and recovery).
Automatic replication of OSS objects across regions for disaster recovery. Supports BCR-02 (business continuity testing) and BCR-03.
Availability Zone redundancy across Alibaba Cloud regions including Malaysia (Kuala Lumpur). Supports BCR-01 (business continuity planning).
DNS-based failover and traffic management for multi-region DR. Supports BCR-02.
Continuous configuration recording, compliance evaluation, and drift detection. Implements CCC-03 (configuration management).
Infrastructure as Code (Terraform-compatible) for controlled, repeatable deployments. Implements CCC-01 (change management).
Automated operations with approval workflows and change execution templates. Supports CCC-02 (quality testing) through controlled automation.
Customer-managed encryption key management with CMK creation, rotation, and access policies. Implements EKM-01 through EKM-04.
Dedicated hardware security modules for cryptographic key storage. Supports high-assurance key management for EKM-02.
TLS/SSL certificate provisioning and lifecycle management. Implements DSP-02 (encryption in transit).

alibabaServices.service: OSS Server-Side Encryption / ECS Disk Encryption
alibabaServices.description: Service-level encryption at rest using KMS-managed keys. Implements DSP-01 (encryption at rest).
ML-powered sensitive data discovery, classification, and de-identification for OSS, RDS, and MaxCompute. Implements DSP-01 (data classification).
Unified data security posture management with data flow analysis, anomaly detection, and access auditing. Supports DSP-05 (data access control).
Resource Access Management policies restricting resource creation to approved regions. Implements DSP-06 (data residency).
Automated data lifecycle management with retention, archival, and deletion policies. Implements DSP-17 (data retention and deletion).

Datacenter physical security is an Alibaba Cloud responsibility. Customers verify via ISO 27001, SOC 2, MLPS 2.0, and CSA STAR reports covering physical access controls and environmental protections. Maps to DCS-01 through DCS-09.
Alibaba Cloud datacenters comply with ISO 27001, SOC 1/2/3, CSA STAR, and China MLPS — all include physical security audit scope. Malaysia KL region provides local data residency.
Multi-account governance with folder hierarchy, centralised policy management, and consolidated billing. Implements GRC-01 (governance programme).
Automated multi-account setup with compliance baselines and guardrails. Implements GRC-01 and GRC-03 (policy enforcement).
Cloud Security Posture Management with compliance scoring against CIS Benchmarks, MLPS, ISO 27001. Supports GRC-02 (risk management).
Core identity and access management with users, roles, policies, and groups. Implements IAM-01 (access control policy) and IAM-04 (provisioning).
Centralised SSO and MFA for enterprise identity federation. Implements IAM-02 (strong authentication) and IAM-03 (MFA).
API call logging for all RAM operations. Supports IAM-12 (access logging) and LOG-01.
Temporary credential issuance eliminating long-lived access keys. Implements IAM-10 (credential management).
Virtual private network with vSwitches, security groups, and network ACLs. Implements IVS-01 (network security) and IVS-06 (segmentation).
Multi-tier DDoS protection for Alibaba Cloud resources. Anti-DDoS Pro provides enhanced volumetric attack mitigation. Implements IVS-04.
Managed network firewall with stateful inspection, IPS, and micro-segmentation. Implements IVS-01 and IVS-04.
Intelligent threat detection using behavioural analysis on network traffic, host activity, and API calls. Implements IVS-09 (threat detection).
Private connectivity to Alibaba Cloud services without internet transit. Implements IVS-06 (network segmentation).
Management event logging across all Alibaba Cloud services and regions. Implements LOG-01 (logging policy) and LOG-03 (security monitoring).
Centralised log collection, analysis, and dashboarding. Implements LOG-02 (log centralisation) and LOG-05 (log retention).
Metrics, alerts, and dashboards for Alibaba Cloud resources. Implements LOG-03 (monitoring) and LOG-13 (alerting).
Network traffic logging for VPC and vSwitches. Implements LOG-01 for network-level visibility.
Immutable object storage for audit log protection. Implements LOG-05 (log integrity and retention).

mappings.ccmDomainName: Security Incident Management, E-Discovery, & Cloud Forensics

alibabaServices.description: Centralised security alert aggregation, automated response, and investigation. Supports SEF-01 (incident management) through alert correlation.
Automated security scanning and vulnerability assessment. Supports SEF-02 (incident response) through proactive detection.

alibabaServices.service: ECS Snapshots / OSS for forensic preservation
alibabaServices.description: Disk snapshots and object storage for forensic evidence preservation. Supports cloud forensics capability.
Access to compliance certifications (SOC 2, ISO 27001, CSA STAR). Supports STA-05 (third-party audit) for vendor assessment.
Vetted third-party software and service marketplace. Supports STA-01 (vendor assessment) through vetting.
Private container registry with image scanning. Supports STA-06 (supply chain security) for container images.
Automated vulnerability scanning for ECS, containers, and web applications. Implements TVM-01 (vulnerability management) and TVM-02 (vulnerability scanning).
Threat intelligence feeds with IP reputation, malware detection, and attack correlation. Implements TVM-06 (threat intelligence).
Automated OS and application patching for ECS instances. Implements TVM-01 (vulnerability remediation).
Container image vulnerability scanning in ACR. Implements TVM-04 (container security).
Device trust evaluation and conditional access policies for cloud resource access. Supports UEM controls through device-based policies.
Managed virtual desktop infrastructure. Supports UEM by providing controlled cloud endpoint environments.
